decisions.rationale: p008_c0002 names the corridor: '4,308 crashes along corridor in past 5 years'.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • 4,308 crashes along corridor in past 5 years • Worst 5% of intersections represent 25% of crashes (Nostrand/Atlantic worst location) • Focus on fixing high-crash locations • Reduce pedestrian crossing distances with bus bulbs • Fix traffic merges and alignment issues (e.g. Nostrand/Atlantic) • Prohibit selected left turns (e.g. Nostrand/Flatbush Junction)

proposed_relations.description: 4,308 crashes along Nostrand/Rogers corridor in past 5 years

evidence_refs.source_quote: • 4,308 crashes along corridor in past 5 years

decisions.rationale: p008_c0002 and p018_c0003 both cite left-turn bans at Nostrand/Flatbush Junction as a project feature of the Nostrand/Rogers SBS project.

evidence_refs.source_quote: • Prohibit selected left turns (e.g. Nostrand/Flatbush Junction)
Left turn bans reduce conflicts in the intersection.
